name: villarrica-forecaster-figures
description: Node-based Mermaid rendering for reproducible Villarrica manuscript workflow figures.

scripts.render:figure02: poetry run python -c "from villarrica_forecaster.config import load_config; from villarrica_forecaster.figures.workflows import figure_02_preprocessing_workflow; figure_02_preprocessing_workflow(load_config('configs/project.toml'))"
